gate.title: Bizzy Enrichment Demo

idle.hint: Enter a company URL to enrich. Try <1>vrt.be</1>.

loading.slow: Taking longer than usual… typical enrichment is 8–12s.

result.noSummary: No summary available — sources didn't support one.

contacts.title: Contacts ({{count}})

news.title: Recent news ({{count}})
news.empty: No recent news found via Tavily or Google News.

error.title: Couldn't enrich this URL.
error.rateLimit: You've hit the demo rate limit (20/hour). Try again later.
